mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rules ORDER BY priority ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rules WHERE 1=1
AND protocol = #{protocol}
AND (LOWER(name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(id) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%')
AND environments_json LIKE '%"' || #{environment} || '"%'
AND (LOWER(host) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{host}) || '%' OR LOWER(service_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{host}) || '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rules (id, name, protocol, service_name, host, port, conditions_json, responses_json, enabled, priority, tags_json, environments_json, tcp_rounds_json, tcp_loop, tcp_pattern, tcp_prefix_hex, tcp_offset_start, tcp_offset_end, tcp_offset_hex, faker_seed, request_count_reset, fault_injection_json, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{protocol}, #{serviceName}, #{host}, #{port}, #{conditions, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{responses, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{enabled}, #{priority}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{environments, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{tcpRounds, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.TcpRoundListHandler}, #{tcpLoop}, #{tcpPattern}, #{tcpPrefixHex}, #{tcpOffsetStart}, #{tcpOffsetEnd}, #{tcpOffsetHex}, #{fakerSeed}, #{requestCountReset}, #{faultInjection, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.FaultInjectionTypeHandler}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE rules SET name = #{name}, protocol = #{protocol}, service_name = #{serviceName}, host = #{host}, port = #{port}, conditions_json = #{conditions, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, responses_json = #{responses, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, tags_json = #{tags, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, environments_json = #{environments, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, tcp_rounds_json = #{tcpRounds, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.TcpRoundListHandler}, tcp_loop = #{tcpLoop}, tcp_pattern = #{tcpPattern}, tcp_prefix_hex = #{tcpPrefixHex}, tcp_offset_start = #{tcpOffsetStart}, tcp_offset_end = #{tcpOffsetEnd}, tcp_offset_hex = #{tcpOffsetHex}, faker_seed = #{fakerSeed}, request_count_reset = #{requestCountReset}, fault_injection_json = #{faultInjection, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.FaultInjectionTypeHandler}, version = #{version}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_history (rule_id, rule_snapshot, created_at) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{ruleSnapshot}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{keepCount})
DELETE FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{keepCount})
mapper.select: SELECT rule_snapshot FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM rule_history WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} AND id = #{historyId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rule_sets ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_sets (id, name, description, rule_ids_json, enabled, tags_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{ruleIds, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{enabled}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
